summary: Live PR inventory shard repaired after deterministic validation. No GitHub mutations, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are planned because the job disables merge/fix/raise_pr and low-signal/instant closeout is disabled. The shard has no shared canonical path; non-security open PRs remain independently tracked, while validator-flagged security-sensitive PRs are routed by exact ref to central OpenClaw security handling.
